SEARCH
程序包 system

类 User

java.lang.Object
system.User
所有已实现的接口:
Serializable
public class User extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a user in the TA Management System.

This class stores basic user information including authentication credentials and role-based access control. Users can have one of three roles: TA (Teaching Assistant), MO (Module Organizer), or ADMIN (Administrator).

The class implements Serializable to support persistence via file storage.

从以下版本开始:
2025

  • 构造器详细资料

    • User

      public User(String email, String password, String role, String name)
      Constructs a new User with the specified credentials and information.
      参数:
      email - the user's email address (unique identifier)
      password - the user's password for authentication
      role - the user's role ("TA", "MO", or "ADMIN")
      name - the user's display name

  • 方法详细资料

    • getEmail

      public String getEmail()
      Returns the user's email address.
      返回:
      the email address

    • getPassword

      public String getPassword()
      Returns the user's password.
      返回:
      the password

    • getRole

      public String getRole()
      Returns the user's role.
      返回:
      the role ("TA", "MO", or "ADMIN")

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the user's display name.
      返回:
      the name

    • setPassword

      public void setPassword(String password)
      Sets the user's password.
      参数:
      password - the new password

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Sets the user's display name.
      参数:
      name - the new name

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this user in CSV format.

      Format: email,password,role,name

      覆盖:
      toString 在类中 Object
      返回:
      the CSV string representation
